//: global.json — pin the .NET SDK version so local builds match CI (tech-debt T20, 2026-04-28). rollForward 'latestFeature' resolves to the HIGHEST installed SDK in the 9.0.x range (same major + minor, latest feature band + patch); it does NOT roll forward to 9.1, 9.2, or a future .NET 10 — those would silently shift analyzer defaults under TreatWarningsAsErrors. 'latestFeature' (not plain 'feature') is required: 'feature' selects the LOWEST band at or above the requested 9.0.0, so on a machine carrying several 9.0.x bands it resolves to 9.0.1xx (Roslyn 4.12) and the 4.14-targeted Voxelforge.Analyzers / Voxelforge.Generators fail to load with CS9057 (the running compiler is older than the analyzer's Roslyn). The looseness within 9.0.x is accepted: security-patch + feature-band bumps inside .NET 9.0 are low-risk and well-tested upstream. See #670.
